case_title: VIKSE, GAIL VS LOPEZ, JUDY IND AND DBA THE STRAND SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO JUDY LOPEZ IND/DBA THE STRAND SERVICE RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT MAIL TO PRENTICE HALL CORP AUTH AGENT FOR RECEIPT OF PROCESS AMANA REFRIGERATION RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIKSE, GAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JUDY  IND AND DBA THE STRAND SERVICE AMANA REFRIGERATION, INC. C/O PRENTICE HALL CORP. $870.51 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $897.51, DISMISS LOPEZ, JUDY IND. AND DBA. THE STRAND SERVICE-WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
